subject: [PATCH v5 2/6] sunrpc: use per-net counts in svc_seq_show()

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch updates the svc_seq_show() function to read procedure call counts from per-network-namespace stat arrays instead of global arrays. This allows /proc/net/rpc/nfsd to report procedure call counts for each network namespace. The change only affects nfsd, which always allocates these arrays, making it safe to use them.
